name: John Mosca
description: American trombonist, hornist and music educator
abstract: John Mosca (born June 22, 1950) is an American jazz trombonist, big band leader and music educator. Mosca started out as a flautist before switching to the trombone.

concerts.label: JVC Jazz Festival: Mel Torme Lonette McKee, Stan Getz, and Dianne Schuur with The Mel Lewis Orchestra
JVC Jazz Festival: Sweet Lorraine: A Jazz Celebration for the Village Vanguard
concerts.venue: Isaac Stern Auditorium / Ronald O. Perelman Stage

about_quotes.speaker: Carmen Leggio
about_quotes.evidence: I just saw John Mosca took it over now. And I just saw them about a month ago... I went down because I knew he was there
about_quotes.doc_title: Carmen Leggio interviewed by Monk Rowe, Tarrytown, New York, October 31, 1998
